case_title: OPORTUN INC.(FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) VS. MARIA GUADALUPE MARTINEZ

docket_entries.description: ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT MARTINEZ, MARIA GUADALUPE
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC.(FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC.(FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MARTINEZ, MARIA GUADALUPE $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $95.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,595.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: 45.00) SERVED JUL-15-2016, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT MARTINEZ, MARIA GUADALUPE
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE DIANNE PEEBLES. FILED BY OPORTUN INC.(FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.)

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY OPORTUN INC.(FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) AS TO DEFENDANT MARTINEZ, MARIA GUADALUPE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-14-2016 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-14-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-14-2016 BY JUDGE PRO TEM DIANNE PEEBLES. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY MARLEN RAMOS--LEGAL COLLECTION SPECIALIST. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DIANNE PEEBLES. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-14-2016 - JUDGMENT.
